Video.summary: Set down your Core Desired Feelings and explore the words that shape your inner world. This practice reveals patterns, clarifies your choices, and turns intention into living energy. Your feelings and words become a beacon, guiding you to live from the heart with focus and purpose.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte
Video.title: Part 1, Day 8-10

Video.summary: Step into Intentional Creation using your Core Desired Feelings as your guide. Align actions with heart-centered intentions, release what no longer serves you, and transform your goals into sacred desires. Cultivate agency, joy, and flow as your inner world shapes your outer reality.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Desire Map Course with Danielle LaPorte
Video.title: The Desire Map Course Part 2 and 3

Image.alt: The Desire Map Course Part 2 and 3
The Desire Map Course Part 2 and 3
The Desire Map Course Part 2 and 3

Video.summary: Day 3 focuses on meeting anger and fear with compassion rather than resistance. By paying gentle attention to difficult emotions, we learn they are not bad—only painful when they define us. Using the breath as an anchor, we develop a kinder, wiser relationship to our inner experience.
Video.title: Day 3 - Compassion

Video.summary: Day 4 explores opening to joy by intentionally taking in the good. We examine habits of threat, perfectionism, and resistance, and practice savoring what’s nourishing and life-giving. Through gentle curiosity, this lesson shows how joy can restore resilience and help us meet life with more ease.
Video.title: Day 4 - Open to Joy

Video.summary: Day 5 introduces the practice of lovingkindness, or metta—a meditation rooted in connection and care. Using gentle phrases, we affirm our shared humanity and inner potential for growth and love. This practice invites curiosity rather than force, allowing experience to unfold naturally.
Video.title: Day 5 - Lovingkindness

Video.summary: Age and orgasms - how to stay satisfied when your body won't cooperate. Plus, is everyone else really having more sex than you are? This and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - A Satisfying Sex Life as You Age

Image.alt: Sex Talk - A Satisfying Sex Life as You Age
Sex Talk - A Satisfying Sex Life as You Age
Sex Talk - A Satisfying Sex Life as You Age

Video.summary: Wondering how to choose the sex toy that is right for you? Plus, we'll explore the healthy habits of couples who are having great sex. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Choosing the Right Sex Toy

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Choosing the Right Sex Toy
Sex Talk - Choosing the Right Sex Toy
Sex Talk - Choosing the Right Sex Toy

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr. Bernard Beitman, often called the King of Coincidences. Dr Beitman is the first psychiatrist since Carl Jung to systematize the study of coincidences. A graduate of Yale Medical School, he did his psychiatric residency at Stanford University. His latest book is Meaningful Coincidences: How and Why Synchronicity and Serendipity Happen.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Dr. Bernard Beitman - Meaningful Coincidences

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Dr. Bernard Beitman - Meaningful Coincidences
The Aware Show: Dr. Bernard Beitman - Meaningful Coincidences
The Aware Show: Dr. Bernard Beitman - Meaningful Coincidences

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Marc H. Morgenstern who has taught Street Smart Startups at UC Berkeley. He's a veteran dealmaker and entrepreneur with billions of dollars of buying, selling, and financing innovative and disruptive businesses. He's a longtime board member of The Rex Foundation, the non-profit founded by the Grateful Dead. He talks about the similarities of attending a Dead show, and making a shrewd business deal. His latest book is The Soul of the Deal.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Marc H Morgenstern - The Soul of the Deal

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Marc H Morgenstern - The Soul of the Deal
The Aware Show: Marc H Morgenstern - The Soul of the Deal
The Aware Show: Marc H Morgenstern - The Soul of the Deal

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Mona Sobhani, Ph.D., who was fully indoctrinated into the cult of science, as a neuroscientist who aggressively defended the dogma of scientific beliefs -- until a series of life-altering events caused her to reconsider spirituality and psi concepts and launched her into a two-year investigation into the mysteries of our world. Her new book is Proof of Spiritual Phenomena: A Neuroscientist’s Discovery of the Ineffable Mysteries of the Universe.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Mona Sobhani, Ph.D. - Proof of Spiritual Phenomena

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Mona Sobhani, Ph.D. - Proof of Spiritual Phenomena
The Aware Show: Mona Sobhani, Ph.D. - Proof of Spiritual Phenomena
The Aware Show: Mona Sobhani, Ph.D. - Proof of Spiritual Phenomena

Video.summary: Having a tough time lately? Join host Lisa Garr as she speaks with beloved poet, teacher, and storyteller, Mark Nepo. Today Mark shares his insight from his latest work, “The Book of the Soul” and shares how crisis can wake us up to opportunity. Info: marknepo.com.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Finding Inner Courage

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Finding Inner Courage
The Aware Show - Finding Inner Courage
The Aware Show - Finding Inner Courage

Video.summary: For day 27 of our journey, we will use the headstand position to practice approaching situations with calm and serenity.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 27 Stillness Headstand

Video.summary: Day 28 of our course will utilize a seated forward fold to tap into this yogic sense of tranquility.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 28 Peace Paschimattansana

Video.summary: Celebrity hypnotist Tim Shurr helps you unlock happiness and shed anxiety. Shari tests her hypnotizability, and the story of a woman who took back her mental health by empowering women worldwide. Plus, live from Heartfulness headquarters in India.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Unlocking Happiness

Video.summary: 1963 Playboy Icon and Cosby Survivor, Victoria Valentino, shares her journey of overcoming unimaginable circumstances leading her to activism and purpose. Plus, one man's heroic efforts to save a tiny, unconscious life, and fun street interviews from NYC.
Video.title: Good Morning Joy - Triumph Over Trauma

Image.alt: Good Morning Joy - Triumph Over Trauma
Good Morning Joy - Triumph Over Trauma
Good Morning Joy - Triumph Over Trauma

Video.summary: A rare in off the cuff dialogue with Anand at breakfast about his father and the true meaning of abundance, wealth, sex, power, fame… Then an epic hike up to 15,000 feet and a temple dedicated to service and unity at Hemkund Sahib and its glacial lake. Here, Tiffany and Elle are served great reminders of the teacher within.
Video.title: Unity at Hemkund Sahib

Video.summary: The longest moto ride of the trip awaits, after a grueling 20 day journey and coming down from Hemkund Sahib, we ride to Rishikesh, where the journey began. But nightfall might set in and cause troubles and challenges. As we know, challenges reveal who we are and the Ganga River serves up a challenge for our narrator Adam, as he learns a deep lesson foretold in episode one. Is the Ganga a mother?
Video.title: A Treacherous Ride Home

Video.summary: We finish at the Sacred Ganga River, where we began. The riders reflect on their journey and the idea of freedom has set in fully. It is our responsibility for choosing how we see the world. To embrace this power, It takes courage, discipline and strength. Something as Sacred as Freedom demands our totality. Thankfully, we are greater than we can imagine.
Video.title: We are Greater than we know.

Image.alt: We are Greater than we know.
We are Greater than we know.
We are Greater than we know.

Video.summary: Arielle discusses her book “Turn Your Mate Into Your SoulMate” and shares why everyone needs to read this if they want a deep fulfilling relationship.
Video.title: How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford

Image.alt: How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford
How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford
How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford

Video.summary: "Play To Win" pits a group of contestants from around the world against one another for a chance to compete for a life-changing job or a six-figure coaching opportunity with the HIGDON GROUP.
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 1

Video.summary: In this episode contestants not only travel from the other side of the world to compete - but they overcome some of the most horrific stories you will ever hear in your life.
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 2

Video.summary: This episode is all about HOW to demonstrate your worth and we've never seen so many people pour themselves out and completely rebuild like we saw in this episode.
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 3

Video.summary: Getting attention for yourself or for a product is one of the most difficult things you will ever be faced with. We devised a unique marketing challenge unlike any of the previous episodes.
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 4

Video.summary: Cynthia Kersey, with cameo appearances by David Meltzer, Blaine Bartlett, John Assaraf and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Cynthia Kersey

Video.summary: Lisa Nichols, with cameo appearances by John Assaraf, Sharon Lechter, Dr.Rev Michael Beckwith, Shanda Sumpter, David Meltzer and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Lisa Nichols

Video.summary: DR. MAX POLO - BIA-ALCL Symptoms DR. ELIZABETH OUELLETTE - Carpal Tunnel DR. JONATHAN GOTTLIEB - Kyphoplasty for Spine Fractures
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E10

Video.summary: TORRE WASHINGTON - Guide to Macros DR. DANIEL MARTINEZ - Male Menopause DR. DANIEL BOBER - Opioid Epidemic
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E11

Video.summary: DR. JOHN MARTIN - Cosmetic Injections Gone Wrong DR. GEORGIY BRUSOVANIK - Spine Surgery (Patient story – Paola) DR. MARCIO FAGUNDES - Proton Therapy & Clinical Trials
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E12

Video.summary: DR. ELIZABETH OUELLETTE - Weight Loss for Wrist Pain DR. ANDREW FORSTER - Suicide DR. DANIEL BOBER - Stalking
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E13
